name: Restwise Yield Optimizer
description: Non-custodial multi-stablecoin (USDT/USDC/USDm) vault keeper on Celo. Autonomously consolidates deposits into the best-paying venue across Aave v3 and Moola Market, converting between stables through Mento FPMM pools with hard min-received protection. Charges a 10% performance fee on realized yield only, settled via x402. Every decision is recorded on-chain in Rebalanced events with the APYs observed at decision time.
